subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the Creator of the heavens unto all who dwell upon earth, that the Call may draw them unto the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله فاطر السماء لمن علی الارض لیقربهم الندآء الی الافق الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God
